headline: cocapn, deadband-protocol, and flywheel-engine now on PyPI.
body: cocapn is fleet identity — version manifest, registry queries, vessel heartbeat. deadband-protocol implements constraint-based filtering with MUST / SHOULD / CANNOT / MAY levels. flywheel-engine is the compounding loop — metrics, tick scheduling, and feedback routing.
fleet_relevance: These three form the deck plate of any Python agent in the fleet. Import them and you're speaking fleet protocol.
actionable: Wire flywheel-engine into your agent's main loop
Test deadband on a sample tile batch
